sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_table SET name = 'updated_example' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, kafkaMurmurHash(name) AS name_hash FROM test_table;
SELECT kafkaMurmurHash(array(id), 'test', toDateTime('2023-10-01 00:00:00')) AS complex_hash FROM test_table;
